debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := ⋯
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⋯
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⋯
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := ⋯
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⋯
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := ⋯
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
afunc_monotone :
  ∀ (list₁ list₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })),
    list₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc list₁ list₂ ≠ []
head : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp : List.foldl afunc [] tail = [] ↔ ¬∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁
⊢ (¬∃ location ∈ head :: tail, location.2 = index₁) → List.foldl afunc [] (head :: tail) = []

proof:
intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                  have h_idx : index₁ ≠ idx := fun he => h ⟨(dt, idx), by simp, he.symm⟩
                  have h_tail : ¬∃ loc ∈ tail, loc.2 = index₁ := fun ⟨loc, hin, he⟩ => h ⟨loc, by simp [hin], he⟩
                  simp [h_idx]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h_tail
failed_attempts:
intro h_not; rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; dsimp
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = head.2
                  · exfalso; apply h_not; exact ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                  · rw [dif_neg h_eq]; exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq'⟩ => h_not ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq'⟩)

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  have h_head : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun h_eq => h ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                  cases head; simp [h_head]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  intro ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩
                  exact h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head
                  simp at h
                  simp [h.1.symm, ind_hyp.mpr h.2]

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                    simp only
                    rw [if_neg (fun h_eq => h ⟨(dt, idx), List.mem_cons_self (dt, idx) tail, h_eq.symm⟩)]
                    exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨loc, mem, res⟩ => h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem (dt, idx) mem, res⟩)

intro h
                  simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  by_cases index₁ = head.2
                  case pos h_is =>
                    exfalso; apply h; exact ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩
                  case neg h_isnot =>
                    simp [h_isnot]; apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    intro ⟨l, hl, h_idx⟩; apply h; exact ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, h_idx⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                  simp only
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = idx
                  · exfalso; apply h; exact ⟨(dt, idx), List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                  · simp [h_eq]; apply ind_hyp.mpr; intro ⟨loc, hl, he⟩
                    exact h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, he⟩
intro h; simp at h; simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef, h.1.symm, ind_hyp.mpr h.2]

simp [List.foldl, afuncDef]
                cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                have h_neq : index₁ ≠ idx := fun h_eq => h_not_exists ⟨(dt, idx), List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq.symm⟩
                simp [h_neq]
                apply ind_hyp.mpr
                intro ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩
                exact h_not_exists ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq⟩

intro h; simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef] at *
                  by_cases h_is : index₁ = head.2
                  case pos h_is => contradiction
                  case neg h_isnot =>
                    simp [h_isnot] at *
                    exact ind_hyp.mpr h.right
intro h; simp at h; rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; simp [h.1.symm, ind_hyp.mpr h.2])

simp only
                  if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then
                    exfalso; exact h ⟨(DT, index₂), List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩
                  else
                    rw [if_neg h_is]
                    exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨l, hl, he⟩ => h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, he⟩)

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  match head with | (dt, idx) =>
                    simp [List.mem_cons] at h
                    simp [h.left.symm]
                    exact ind_hyp.mpr h.right

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons]
                  have h_head : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    rw [afuncDef]; match head with | (dt, idx) =>
                    simp only; split; next h_is => exact (h ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩).elim
                    next => rfl
                  rw [h_head]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨loc, hin, he⟩ => h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hin, he⟩)
intro h; simp [afuncDef, List.foldl_cons]; cases head; simp at h; simp [h]; exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h
                  simp at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head
                  simp [h.1.symm]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h_none
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk DT index₂ =>
                  simp only
                  have h_isnot : index₁ ≠ index₂ := fun h_eq => h_none ⟨(DT, index₂), List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_eq⟩
                  rw [dif_neg h_isnot]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_idx⟩
                  exact h_none ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem, h_idx⟩

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                  simp
                  by_cases h_eq : index₁ = idx
                  · exact (h ⟨(dt, idx), List.Mem.head _ _, h_eq.symm⟩).elim
                  · simp [h_eq]
                    apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    intro ⟨loc, h_mem, h_idx⟩
                    exact h ⟨loc, List.Mem.tail _ h_mem, h_idx⟩

intro h_not_exists
                  simp only [List.mem_cons, exists_eq_or_imp, not_or] at h_not_exists
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, show afunc [] head = [] by rw [afuncDef]; cases head; simp [h_not_exists.left]]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h_not_exists.right

intro h_none
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  simp only
                  split
                  · intro h_is; exfalso; apply h_none; exact ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩
                  · intro; apply ind_hyp.mpr
                    intro ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩
                    exact h_none ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq⟩

intro h; simp at h; rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; cases head; simp
                  by_cases h_is : index₁ = snd
                  · exfalso; exact h.1 h_is.symm
                  · simp [h_is]; exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h
                  simp [afuncDef, List.foldl_cons]
                  split
                  · exfalso; exact h ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, by simp [*]⟩
                  · apply ind_hyp.mpr; intro ⟨l, hl, heq⟩; exact h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, heq⟩)

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head; rename_i dt idx
                  simp at h
                  simp [h.left, ind_hyp.mpr h.right]

intro h
                  simp [List.mem_cons, exists_or_eq_left, not_or] at h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head
                  simp [h.1.symm, ind_hyp.mpr h.2]
intro h; simp at h; rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; cases head; simp [h.1.symm]; exact ind_hyp.mpr h.2

intro h
                  have h_ne : index₁ ≠ head.2 := fun h_e => h ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_e.symm⟩
                  have : afunc [] head = [] := by rw [afuncDef]; simp [h_ne]
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, this]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨loc, h_mem, h_eq⟩ => h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem head h_mem, h_eq⟩)

intro h
                  have h_head : afunc [] head = [] := by
                    rw [afuncDef]; simp; split
                    next h_is => exfalso; exact h ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩
                    next h_is_not => rfl
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, h_head]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  intro ⟨loc, m, e⟩; exact h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ m, e⟩

intro h
                  simp [afuncDef, List.foldl_cons]
                  split_ifs with h1
                  · exfalso; apply h; exact ⟨head, List.mem_cons_self _ _, h1.symm⟩
                  · exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨loc, h_in, h_eq⟩ => h ⟨loc, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_in, h_eq⟩)

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk DT idx =>
                  simp only
                  by_cases h_is : index₁ = idx
                  · exact (h ⟨(DT, idx), List.mem_cons_self _ _, h_is.symm⟩).elim
                  · simp [h_is]; exact ind_hyp.mpr (fun ⟨l, hl, hi⟩ => h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, hi⟩)

intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                  have : index₁ ≠ idx := fun e => h ⟨(dt, idx), List.mem_cons_self _ _, e.symm⟩
                  simp [this]
                  apply ind_hyp.mpr
                  exact fun ⟨l, hl, he⟩ => h ⟨l, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hl, he⟩
successful_attempts:
intro h
                  rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                  cases head with | mk dt idx =>
                  have h_idx : index₁ ≠ idx := fun he => h ⟨(dt, idx), by simp, he.symm⟩
                  have h_tail : ¬∃ loc ∈ tail, loc.2 = index₁ := fun ⟨loc, hin, he⟩ => h ⟨loc, by simp [hin], he⟩
                  simp [h_idx]
                  exact ind_hyp.mpr h_tail
